title: subworkflow - aws close open security group port
description:
Subworkflow to restrict a specific port in a security group from public access

This subworkflow removes overly permissive inbound rules allowing public access to sensitive ports.

Parameters:

groupIdorName: (Required) Security group ID or name to modify
sensitivePort: (Required) Port number to restrict (e.g., 22, 3389, 1433)
awsRegion: (Required) AWS region
descriptionFilter: (Optional) Rule description to match for deletion
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

Returns confirmation of rule removal or recommendation for manual review
guide:
## 🔐 **Subworkflow to Close Open Security Group Port**

🛡️ This subworkflow remediates security vulnerabilities by restricting public access to sensitive ports in security groups.

Automates the remediation of overly permissive inbound rules allowing unrestricted access on critical ports.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **groupIdorName** (Required): 🆔 Security group ID or name
- **sensitivePort** (Required): 🔌 Port to restrict  
  *(Examples: 22 for SSH, 3389 for RDP, 1433 for SQL Server)*
- **awsRegion** (Required): 🌍 AWS region
- **descriptionFilter** (Optional): 📝 Rule description to match
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 AWS OIDC connection

---

### 📊 **High-Risk Ports to Restrict**

| Port | Service | Risk | Remediation |
|------|---------|------|-------------|
| 22 | SSH | CRITICAL | Whitelist or SSM Session Manager |
| 3389 | RDP | CRITICAL | Whitelist or SSM Session Manager |
| 1433 | SQL Server | HIGH | Restrict to subnet only |
| 5432 | PostgreSQL | HIGH | Restrict to app subnet |
| 3306 | MySQL | HIGH | Restrict to app subnet |

---

### ⚠️ **Important Notes**

✓ Backup security group before modifications
✓ Test with non-critical instances first
✓ Ensure alternative access methods available (SSM)
✓ Document changes for audit trail

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ Security remediation
- ✅ Compliance enforcement
- ✅ Vulnerability patching
- ✅ Automated hardening

---

validate-remediation.name: validate-remediation
validate-remediation.description: Validate and prepare security group port closure
